description: Ivanti Connect Secure / Policy Secure edge-appliance CVEs — auth bypass + command injection (CVE-2023-46805 / CVE-2024-21887) and stack-buffer-overflow RCE (CVE-2025-0282). Detection-only path fingerprints.

ics_authbypass_cmdi_2024.description: CVE-2023-46805 (auth bypass in web component) chained with CVE-2024-21887 (command injection in /api/v1/totp/user-backup-code). Detection = confirm the vulnerable REST paths are reachable without auth; no OS command is injected.

probes.description: Reaching system-information through the /../ auth-bypass traversal (200, not redirected to /dana-na/ login) = CVE-2023-46805 auth bypass present, the precondition for the CVE-2024-21887 command-injection chain. Detection only.
Ivanti Connect Secure / Pulse Secure login fingerprint (dana-na welcome page / DSSignInURL) — confirms the affected VPN appliance.

ics_stack_overflow_rce_2025.description: CVE-2025-0282 — Ivanti Connect Secure / Policy Secure / ZTA Gateways stack-based buffer overflow → unauthenticated RCE. Detection = confirm the affected appliance/endpoint; overflow exploitation is destructive and NOT sent by this probe.

probes.description: Presence of the Host Checker component path (200/302) fingerprints an Ivanti Connect Secure build in the CVE-2025-0282 affected range. Fingerprint only; version confirmation is operator-supervised.
